---
name: generate-all
description: Generate all four outputs (process map, findings, waste, client website) in one run
menu-code: GA
---

# Generate All Outputs

## Purpose

Run all four client deliverable generators in sequence: process map, findings, waste, client website. One command, four files.

**Note:** `audit-report.html` and `priority-matrix.html` are NOT generated by GA. Run GR or GM explicitly if you need them. The priority matrix requires `proposed_changes[]` from the process analyst agent.

## Process

### Step 1: Pre-flight

```bash
python3 .claude/skills/bmad-apg-agent-analyst/scripts/validate_audit_data.py \
  --file clients/{client_slug}/audit/audit-data.json --verbose
```

Show the validation summary. If there are critical findings, stop and ask to fix them first. High findings are noted as warnings but generation proceeds.

### Step 2: Generate All

```bash
python3 .claude/skills/bmad-apg-agent-generator/scripts/generate.py \
  --client-slug {client_slug} \
  --output all
```

### Step 3: Report

```
ALL OUTPUTS GENERATED — {company_name}
Generated: {timestamp}

  clients/{client_slug}/deliverables/process-map.html
  clients/{client_slug}/deliverables/findings.html
  clients/{client_slug}/deliverables/waste.html
  clients/{client_slug}/deliverables/client-website.html

Process Map:      {n} steps across {n} stages
Findings:         {n} pain points across {n} stages
Waste:            {n} waste items, £{total} annual waste identified
Client Site:      {n} of 6 sections unlocked ({audit_status})

⚠ Open items to address before client delivery:
  • {list of unresolved contradictions if any}
  • {list of pending HIGH priority follow-up questions if any}
  • {stages still pending data collection if any}
  • {warning if pain_points[] is empty — suggest running WF first}
  • {warning if waste_items[] is empty — suggest running TW first}
```

### Step 4: Deploy (Optional)

Ask the user: "Deploy to client portal? (Y/n)"

If yes, run the GD (deploy) skill to push deliverables to the client's password-protected portal.

Save memory automatically after successful generation.
